mapper.select: SELECT * FROM work_task WHERE assignee_id = #{assignee_id} AND completed_time IS NULL ORDER BY FIELD(priority, '高','中','低'), deadline ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_task (task_type, priority, related_order_no, related_batch_id, goods_id, source_location_id, target_location_id, assignee_id, deadline, created_time, completed_time, remark) VALUES (#{task_type}, #{priority}, #{related_order_no}, #{related_batch_id}, #{goods_id}, #{source_location_id}, #{target_location_id}, #{assignee_id}, #{deadline}, #{created_time}, #{completed_time}, #{remark})
